result.stdout:
Diceware:
  Application that randomly draws words folling the Diceware(TM) rules.

Usage:
  Diceware [options]

Options:
  -c, --word-count <C>        The number of words that compose the passphrase.
  -s, --extra-security <S>    Adds an extra symbol in the passphrase.
  -u, --download-url <U>      An URL where to download the words list.
  -f, --force-download <F>    Force download of the words list even if cache exists. This overwrites the currently cached file if exists.
  --version                   Display version information

commands.payload:
Diceware:
  Application that randomly draws words folling the Diceware(TM) rules.

Usage:
  Diceware [options]

Options:
  -c, --word-count <C>        The number of words that compose the passphrase.
  -s, --extra-security <S>    Adds an extra symbol in the passphrase.
  -u, --download-url <U>      An URL where to download the words list.
  -f, --force-download <F>    Force download of the words list even if cache exists. This overwrites the currently cached file if exists.
  --version                   Display version information
